configureEslint.description: Generate runtime ESLint integration from all governance profiles.
configureEslint.x-prompt: Generate ESLint module-boundary integration from governance profiles? (recommended)

eslintConfigPath.description: Explicit path to the flat ESLint config file to patch when configureEslint is enabled. When omitted, Nx Governance autodetects eslint.config.mjs, eslint.config.cjs, then eslint.config.js.

governanceHelperPath.description: Path where the generated governance depConstraints helper module should be written when configureEslint is enabled.

profile.description: Governance profile name to seed or migrate when extracting inline ESLint depConstraints.

profilePath.description: Governance profile path to seed or migrate when extracting inline ESLint depConstraints.
